news.title: Alphabet and Tesla test Wall Street's patience as AI spending overshadows growth
news.summary: Shares of Alphabet and Tesla dipped after the companies reported massive spending increases in their quarterly earnings reports. Shares of Google, Facebook and Microsoft also dipped after their quarterly reports.

news.title: Trump says Saudi nuclear deal contingent on relations with Israel, does not include enrichment
news.summary: The civilian nuclear cooperation agreement, signed Wednesday, will be sent to Congress for review, the Department of Energy says. The agreement was signed by the U.S., Israel and South Korea.

news.title: Albertsons stock plunges as it says weaker grocery spending will cut into sales and earnings
news.summary: Shares of Albertsons sank Thursday after the grocer reported softness in its core business. The company lowered its full-year outlook as a result.

news.title: American Airlines stock tumbles 8% as fuel spike further postpones turnaround
news.summary: American Airlines further cuts its 2026 earnings outlook, citing higher fuel costs. American Airlines further cut its 20 26 earnings outlook,. citing higherfuel costs.

news.title: Brent crude tops $100 a barrel. How the next stop could be $120
news.summary: Goldman Sachs warns on oil prices and so called tank bottoms. Goldman Sachs loves a new natural gas-related name. The bank also loves the idea of a "golden nugget"

news.title: Alphabet’s massive profit growth is just an illusion, as SpaceX and Anthropic help mask a historic cash drain
news.summary: An analyst calls that an “illusory’ performance propped up by unrealized gains from equity investments. Earnings quadrupled on paper, but an analyst calls it an ‘illusory' performance.

news.title: I am a 63-year-old semiretired physician. If you have saved $2 million for retirement, should Social Security be optional?
news.summary: “At that point, they arguably no longer need the government’s retirement safety net,” he says. “At the end of the day, they’re already retired.”

news.title: For young investors, $100,000 was once the gateway to wealth. Today, it’s double that.
news.summary: Young people who want to feel rich in today’s economy need to have a lot more. While this investing benchmark is still worth celebrating, young people need more.

news.title: Global oil prices top $100 after Houthis claim strikes on Saudi Arabian tankers
news.summary: Brent crude tops $100 a barrel for the first time since May. Yemen’s Houthi militants claimed attacks on two Saudi Arabian tankers.

news.title: AI stocks are echoing a 1990s market split. JPMorgan warns the next few weeks are critical.
news.summary: The different price action between artificial-intelligence hyperscalers and chip and infrastructure stocks is a throwback to a setup in the late 1990s, argues JPMorgan.
